text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check out the mod guidelines in #mod-resources and feel free to ask questions. Glad to have you on the team!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Take a look around, introduce yourself, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Check out #mentorship for pairing info and resources. We're excited to have your experience on board!
Welcome, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Head over to #events to see upcoming activities and how you can pitch in. Great to have you!
